prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年苏州大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约6550名、6376名、6632名、6046名、6564名，整体呈波动走势，近5年位次在6000–6600区间震荡，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约6564名；苏州大学在天津市招生计划2021–2022年均为38人，2023–2024年缩减至36人，2025年进一步降至35人；2026年计划大幅增至52人，较2025年扩招约48.6%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第40–46名区间（2026年排名第46位），属于全国百强中上游水平，综合实力较强；2024年声誉偏正面（食堂改善），但2026年声誉转为偏负面（涉及校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第46位，评价为"较热"，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；苏州大学第五轮学科评估中，体育学、药学获评A-，为该校代表性优势学科；其余招生专业如计算机、临床医学、材料等虽未获A级评估，但依托211平台仍具竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持推荐热度；法学、师范呈分化观望；天津市考生总数从2021年54025人持续增至2025年71938人，2026年预估约82000人（+14%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线（本科批）从2021年463分缓慢升至2025年476分，呈小幅上升趋势；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，属长三角经济发达地区，对天津考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在天津招生占比约0.4%–0.6%，属外省招生规模较小的学校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+48.6%）与天津市考生总数显著增加（+14%）两大核心因素，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，理论上竞争有所缓解，位次应后移（数字增大）；但结合学校声誉偏负面、抖音热度一般、专业热度分化等辅助信号，适度修正后预测2026年最低录取位次约8507名，较2025年6564名后移约1943名，区间8007–9007名。

- 计算机科学与技术
- 软件工程
- 电子信息工程。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年苏州大学在天津大幅扩招，预测位次区间8007–9007名，较往年明显后移。位次在8000名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档热门专业（临床医学、计算机、软件工程等）；位次在8000–8500名区间建议以二档专业为主、一档边缘专业为辅；位次在8500–9000名区间建议以三档专业保底、二档专业冲刺。药学（A-学科）虽未单独列出，但作为苏州大学优势学科值得关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 6550, 6376, 6632, 6046, and 6564, showing a fluctuating trend with no clear single direction, oscillating in the 6000–6600 range over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6564; the enrollment plan for Soochow University in Tianjin was 38 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 36 in 2023–2024, and further decreased to 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 52 students, an expansion of about 48.6% compared to 2025, which has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, with a stable ranking in the 40–46 range in the Soft Science China University Rankings (ranked 46th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100, with relatively strong overall strength; its reputation was slightly positive in 2024 (improved cafeteria), but turned slightly negative in 2026 (involving campus safety incidents); its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; no obvious admission gaps or breaks were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Soochow University's Physical Education and Pharmacy received A- ratings, representing its signature advantageous disciplines; other enrolled majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Materials, though not receiving A-level evaluations, remain competitive due to the Project 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommendation heat; Law and Teacher Training show divergence and wait-and-see attitudes; the total number of examinees in Tianjin has increased from 54,025 in 2021 to 71,938 in 2025, with an estimated 82,000 in 2026 (+14%), intensifying overall competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has slowly risen from 463 in 2021 to 476 in 2025, showing a slight upward trend; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Tianjin examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Tianjin is about 0.4%–0.6%, making it one of the smaller-scale schools for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of a significant expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (+48.6%) and a notable increase in the total number of Tianjin examinees (+14%), the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate, theoretically easing competition and causing the ranking to shift backward (increase in number); however, combined with auxiliary signals such as a slightly negative university reputation, average Douyin popularity, and divergent major popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 8507, a backward shift of about 1943 from 6564 in 2025, with a range of 8007–9007.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Soochow University significantly expands enrollment in Tianjin, with a predicted ranking range of 8007–9007, notably lower than previous years. Candidates with rankings within 8000 can focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Software Engineering, etc.); those with rankings between 8000–8500 are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors with some Tier 1 marginal majors; candidates with rankings between 8500–9000 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and Tier 2 majors as reach options. Although Pharmacy (A- discipline) is not listed separately, it is worth attention as an advantageous discipline of Soochow University.
